steps.t: The second and third floors can be found in Meduseld, the great hall in Edoras. You should climb the stairs to the higher floors and have a last look …
The loose floorboard can be found on the third floor of Meduseld. You should examine the loose floorboard.
Éowyn stands on the steps of Meduseld, looking out upon Edoras. You have found an opened letter in the loose floorboards in Meduseld, and should bring…
